title: Winter Horrorscape
description: A Horror mod pack, set in the winter. Lot's of horror mods.
body:
**Currently making this your server modpack has issues. I'm trying to figure them out**

Within the desolate snow covered lands... horrorific creature remain and few stubborn communites survive. Survive as they lurk, and hunt you down.

**MAIN THINGS ADDED**
- A never ending winter (even commands can't stop it)
- A lot of horror mods to hunt you down ie From the Fog, sirenhead and cave dweller reskins.
- Larger, overhauled villages
- Temperature and water needs (good luck it is impossible to survive with them in my testing)
- Bunch of QOL mods
- Elytra Flight Simulator (Do a Barrel Roll mod. really good mod)
- FP viewmodel
  
That is it for now but I am gonna keep adding more mods overtime.

**NOTE NONE OF THIS MODS ARE MINE. DON'T NOTIFY ME OF SPECIFIC MOD ISSUES BECAUSE I CAN'T DO NOTHING ABOUT IT**
